content:
And he was like, but I had all of these values .

I was just, they just came very easily to me in my void.

And he was like, as growing up, I had a very shitty family.

I didn't have much of a family.

And so I made my own family, right?

I was the guy that never wanted the party to end because I didn't want my family to leave.

And, right, I made my family.

And so I pick, I was honoring my values and I was picking my people, right?

And it was very low class.

And so by changing that perspective and just altering a little bit without being hard on myself, I just figured out to rewire those values into business, into ways that would make me money and to clash those values and voids together because now I have a family in my business and now, right, we're millionaires and we strive to make more millions instead of talking about where we're going to get blacked out on them Friday all week long.

And so, rant over, but hopefully that like adds a little bit of perspective to it.
